sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40613" key="e)pipo/rfuros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιπόρφῠρ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n40613.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a purple tinge</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg001:4:6:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.6.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
